_meta.description: Substack publications polled via public RSS ({subdomain}.substack.com/feed). Raw feed: title + excerpt + link + entity tags, no AI. Free posts give full-ish content in RSS; paid posts give preview only. We store only a short excerpt (capped at 280 chars) either way and always link back to the original post.
_meta.validation_status: Verified working feeds only. Currently just The Stein Line (confirmed live, NBA content, entity tagging validated against the dry-run output). The phase-3-live-layer-tuning PR was supposed to import ~23 publications from Jorge's nba_substack_newsletters.csv but that file wasn't present in the build sandbox; the expansion is deferred to a follow-up PR (or a manual edit) once the CSV is available. Verify any added entry with: curl -sI https://{slug}.substack.com/feed | head -1 (expect HTTP/2 200), then a quick dry-run to confirm NBA content and entity tagging.

publications.name: The Stein Line (Marc Stein)
publications.validation: verified 2026-05-24 — live, NBA content, entity tagging working
